description: A love-forever classic, this murcia bag is a closet essential. Perfect for colour blocking and mix-and-match ensembles, make this piece your go-to essential to add a fresh twist to off-duty staples. Height: 34 cm Width: 27 cm Depth: 8 cm Check patterned textured leatherette upper Two zippered pockets on the front Two side pockets with elasticated mouths One main compartment with a zippered pocket and a pouch Two adjustable shoulder straps at the back Care Wipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust
